Next year, I am going to lead two projects.
I think I will win the election.
In five years, I am going to pursue the presidency.
Dont worry, I will send the proposal today.
So, Marcos, where do you see yourself in five years? What are your goals?
My long-term goal is clear. In five years, I am going to pursue the presidency of the association.
That is a bold ambition. What is your first step toward that vision?
This year, I am going to finish my international certification. Then, next year, I am going to lead two cross-border projects.
Do you think you will be ready to run as a candidate by then?
I think I will. I aspire to lead, and I am going to work hard to earn it.
I admire that. If you need support, I will introduce you to the board members.
Thank you, that means a lot. With your help, I am going to turn this vision into reality.
I think I will succeed in the long term.
My long-term goal is to lead the association.
I aspire to be a leader in my field.

Let me share my five-year plan. In the short term, this year, I am going to finish the international certification in valuation. Next year, I am going to lead two cross-border projects with partners in Europe. By the end of the year, I will probably present at the regional congress for the first time. In about three years, I am going to run as a candidate for the UPAV board. My long-term goal is clear: in five years, I will pursue the presidency of the association. I know it is ambitious, but I am going to work hard and stay focused. Step by step, I am going to turn this vision into reality.

Hi Marcos, this is Beatriz from the program committee. I am calling about an exciting future project. Next spring, we are going to launch an international working group on valuation standards, and we would love you to lead it. The first meeting will be in March, and we will travel to three countries during the year. I think this is a great step toward your long-term goals, and it fits your ambition perfectly. We are going to send you the full proposal by email this week. Please take a look and let me know if you want to pursue it. I really hope you will say yes. Talk soon.
